title: Nastia`s Miracle Stones
description: Mod based on the theme of the show Miraculous Ladybug & Cat Noir. aims to add content from this show and related ones, such as kwami,miraculouses, suits,super heroes and super villains
body:
The mod is based on the theme of the Miraculous Ladybug & Cat Noir series. The objective is to incorporate content from the series and related content such as kwami, miraculouses, suits, superheroes and supervillains.

## **Credits for glowing armor and items - Furti Two(furti_two)**
## 

The mod adds magical jewellery-Miraculouses.
With the help of them you can call Kwami, cute and powerful creatures. Equipping miraculous you can transform into a super hero (or super villain), you will get superhuman strength, speed, jumping ability. As well as you get magical weapons with many functions and applications.
And most importantly, each hero has his own unique superpower.

Mods are required:Geckolib API, Curios API, Kleider`s Custom Renderer API

The mod aims to add unique things that can not be found in other mods on similar themes

The following Miraculouses are currently present in the mod:
-Ladybug Miraculous-Give you the power of Creation
(Currently has 16 suit preferences that you can choose for transformation!)
![Ladybug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91db438221186892b9d017620f92be3c270778ce.png)

 

The mod is survival friendly and gives you the ability to craft Miraculouses.

Also we tried to add to the mod full and useful information about superpowers that would make it easier for players to understand the mod

We plan to add all Miraculouses, all kwamis and their revealed forms (including non-canonical ones), add Miracle Boxes
We also want to add fan miraculouses, for example Wolf, Bear, Bat, etc. 

Discrord server of Alucard Space Team, and this mod
https://discord.gg/7b3aYWRvev
